summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Niyyah Daily Islamic spiritual practice app completed successfully. All major features tested including onboarding, navigation, prayer tracking, counters, meditation mode, and data persistence.
passed_tests: Daily intention modal with 4 choices selection
Navigation between all 4 tabs (Accueil, Pratique, Méditer, Stats)
Prayer checkboxes functionality for all 5 prayers (Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha)
Score calculation and progress bar updates
Dhikr items (Ayat al-Kursi, Shukr, Basmala) checkboxes
Istighfar and Tasbih counters with + buttons
Meditation mode with 3/5/10 minute timer options
Stats page with streak display and badges system
Prayer times API integration for Paris
Arabic text display throughout the app
